translation.When a token uses the auto group, the sy: When a token uses the auto group, the system tries groups from top to bottom until it finds an available group.
translation.When conditions match, apply a multiplie: When conditions match, apply a multiplier or replace the base price with a fixed per-request charge. Multiple matching multipliers multiply together.
translation.When enabled, large request bodies are t: When enabled, large request bodies are temporarily stored on disk instead of memory, significantly reducing memory usage. SSD recommended.
translation.When enabled, Midjourney callbacks are a: When enabled, Midjourney callbacks are accepted (reveals server IP).
translation.When enabled, newly created tokens start: When enabled, newly created tokens start in the first auto group.
translation.When enabled, paid subscription orders c: When enabled, paid subscription orders can be selected in invoice requests.
translation.When enabled, prompts are scanned before: When enabled, prompts are scanned before reaching upstream models.
translation.When enabled, users can pick this group: When enabled, users can pick this group when creating tokens.
translation.When enabled, violation requests will in: When enabled, violation requests will incur additional charges.
translation.When enabled, zero-cost models also pre-: When enabled, zero-cost models also pre-consume quota before final settlement.
translation.When performance monitoring is enabled a: When performance monitoring is enabled and system resource usage exceeds the set threshold, new Relay requests will be rejected.
